name: Dark Days of Horror
short_description: Dive into this survival horror game where your hero kill zombies and have also to destroy the laboratory in which they are being produced. Complete tasks to move to the next level.
detailed_description:
Feature List

  • Help - Signal for help by fire up logs to create smoke
  • Key - Enter the library and open the locked Doors
  • Codes - Hidden codes to move to the next level
  • Bombs - Collecting bombs to destroy the laboratory


feature highlights

  • Resolution - HD resources with a 720p & 1080 screen setup
  • Difficulty - Change depth distance view
  • Control - FPS mouse controls set-up for walking/looking around
  • Characters - AI enemies


About the Game

Dark Days Of Horror


Alone your hero is vulnerable and under-armed. Along the path, creatures and zombies will protect the laboratory of a scientist from being destroyed. Your mission is to accomplish tasks to proceed for the next level. Kill all the creatures and zombies to gain access to the laboratory. Look for help by lighting a fire for signal. Find the key to enter the Library. Search for hidden codes to open next levels. Get access to the Laboratory and burn everything. Prepare yourself for an horror environment. Don` t play this game during the night!!!!

Enjoy Your Journey to the Deep Dark....
